summary: Backend API tests for Route Refinement feature completed successfully. All 14 tests passed, covering GET /api/stops, POST /api/optimize with sections parameter, GET /api/mapbox-token, and GET /api/directions endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: Section-based route refinement logic (lines 1720-1856) is well-implemented with proper handling of edge cases
Invalid stop IDs in sections are gracefully skipped rather than causing errors
Empty sections array correctly falls through to normal optimization
seed_data_creation: Test creates temporary stops with TEST_ prefix and cleans them up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: DEV_MODE was temporarily enabled in /app/backend/.env for testing and has been removed. All backend APIs for route refinement feature are working correctly. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_route_refinement.py can be reused for regression testing by adding DEV_MODE=true to .env and restarting backend.

api_endpoints_tested.notes: Returns list of stops for authenticated user
Section-based route refinement works correctly, returns message='Route refined with sections', algorithm='section_refinement'
Falls through to normal optimization as expected
Handles gracefully by skipping invalid IDs
